# VS Code Agent Mode Instruction Set

## General Architecture & Principles
- Use MudBlazor and use Lisa\wwwroot\app.css for custom styles.
- This project uses clean architecture principles.
- Use Lisa.Domain for domain logic.
- Use Lisa.Infrastructure for data access and infrastructure concerns.
- Use Lisa.Application for application logic.
- Use Lisa.Web for web-related code.
- Use Lisa.Components for reusable components.
- Adhere to the .editorconfig settings.
- Use Primary Constructors.
